title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXIII. Riddles.
content:
[An Icicle.]

        Lives in winter,
        Dies in summer,
        And grows with its root upwards!
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXIII. Riddles."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
